title: Tanacetopsis krascheninnikovii
taxonomy: Tanacetopsis krascheninnikovii is classified within the family Compositae, also known as the aster or sunflower family. This plant is further categorized as a genus within the tribe Anthemideae. Tanacetopsis krascheninnikovii is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and is often found growing in alpine meadows and rocky slopes. Its classification reflects its close relationship to other flowering plants within the Compositae family. Further classification of Tanacetopsis krascheninnikovii may involve its order and family within the broader taxonomy of plant species.
